name: Chili Bean Tacos
recipeIngredient: 1/2 Red bell pepper, seeded and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. Heat olive oil in a saucepan.
3. Add sausage, onion, garlic, cumin, and chili powder; fry gently for 5 minutes, stirring to break up the sausage.
4. Add tomato, tomato paste, bell pepper, and kidney beans. Stir well and cook gently for 15 minutes, stirring frequently to prevent the mixture from sticking.
5. Season with salt.
6. Meanwhile, heat taco shells following package instructions.
7. Fill each hot taco shell with the sausage mixture.
8. Top each taco with sour cream and sprinkle with paprika.
9. Serve with lettuce leaves and radish roses.
Variation: Substitute lean ground beef for sausage, if desired.
